evidence.scope: files=task-artifacts+github-issues surface=tasks+github-issue-tracker bounded to the existing repository backlog
evidence.behavior: one bounded workflow: derive phased backlog, deduplicate existing coverage, create labeled issues
evidence.dependency: interfaces=local task artifacts plus gh-wrap GitHub issue creation
evidence.uncertainty: spec overlap requires judgment around dedup and backend/frontend splitting, but the source set is fully available
evidence.verification: checks=lint,build,test plus wrapper-backed issue creation verification
evidence.guardrails: no product code changes; no schema changes; localized to planning artifacts and issue tracker state; reversible with manual issue cleanup if needed

overrides.reason: Two phases are sufficient: backlog derivation/documentation, then GitHub issue creation and verification.
